title: FPS Display Mod
description:
FPS Display Mod is a HUD mod that currently has Fps Display and Day Count and more display elements.

The mod also has full configurability in modmenu.

More features may be added later! I am open to suggestions in the comment section!
body:
FPS Display Mod is a hud mod that currently has fps display element and day count display element.

More features may be added later! I am open to suggestions in the comments! Please leave good reviews!

Developed by OhJona
